zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Crooke於1618年7月19日出生在英國英格蘭倫敦福利哈姆時，她的父親Roger Crooke27歲，母親Sarah Rogers26歲。她於1645年6月24日與John Guild在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1669年8月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Crooke于1618年7月19日出生在英国英格兰倫敦福利哈姆时，她的父亲Roger Crooke27岁，母亲Sarah Rogers26岁。她于1645年6月24日与John Guild在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1669年8月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Crooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Crooke was born on 19 July 1618, in Fulham, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Crooke, was 27 and her mother, Sarah Rogers, was 26. She married John Guild on 24 June 1645, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 31 August 1669, in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51, and was buried in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Crooke est née le 19 juillet 1618, à Fulham, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Crooke, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sarah Rogers, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Guild le 24 juin 1645, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1669, à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Crooke am 19. Juli 1618 in Fulham, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Crooke 27 und ihre Mutter Sarah Rogers 26. Sie hat am 24. Juni 1645 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Guild geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. August 1669 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Crooke è nata il il 19 luglio 1618 nel Fulham, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Crooke, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Sarah Rogers, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Guild il 24 giugno 1645, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 agosto 1669, nel Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Crookeが1618年7月19日にイギリスイギリスロンドンフウルハムで生まれた時，父Roger Crookeは27歳，母Sarah Rogersは26歳であった。1645年6月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでJohn Guildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1669年8月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.St Clement Danes,St Clement Danes,Westmi: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 클레멘트 단아네스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Crooke(이)가 1618년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 프함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Crooke(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Rogers(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1645년 6월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 John Guild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1669년 8월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.19 July 1618–31 August 1669: 19 de julho de 1618–31 de agosto de 1669

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Crooke nasceu em 19 de julho de 1618, em Fulham, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Crooke, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Rogers, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Guild em 24 de junho de 1645, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1669, em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.St Clement Danes,St Clement Danes,Westmi: ст клемент данесь, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Crooke родилась 19 июля 1618 г. в местности фьулхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Crooke было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Rogers, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Guild 24 июня 1645 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 августа 1669 г. в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Crooke nació el 19 de julio de 1618, en Fulham, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Crooke, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sarah Rogers, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Guild el 24 de junio de 1645, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1669, en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
